title: Bridge Essay: VR for Pain Relief.
concept: Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership as constructed percept.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership as constructed percept.

**VR for Pain Relief.** - Curr Top Behav Neurosci (2023). DOI: 10.1007/7854_2022_402. PMID: 36592274. The present chapter explores how immersive virtual reality (VR) systems can be used for pain research and treatment. Pain is a universal, yet entirely subjective and multifaceted unpleasant experience. One of the earliest VR studies on pain highlighted the role of attention in pain modulation. However, the role of body representation in pain modulation has also been described as a crucial factor.
